languages.text:
The familiar immediately restores 100% Wounds. The familiar is also resurrected if it has 0 Wounds. The next 3 Overseer abilities cost -1 AP.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}Obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks through the Eagle are considered auto-crit if hitting other enemies.

traits.locale_text:
The familiar immediately restores 100% Wounds. The familiar is also resurrected if it has 0 Wounds. The next 3 Overseer abilities cost -1 AP.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}Obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks through the Eagle are considered auto-crit if hitting other enemies.

languages.text:
The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} that enemy's allies automatically score {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full wounds (even if it has 0 wounds). The Overseer's next three abilities cost −1 AP less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks toward the cyber-eagle's side which hit other enemies automatically score critical hits.

The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} that enemy's allies automatically score {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} that enemy's allies automatically score {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} that enemy's allies automatically score {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

languages.text:
Киберорел немедленно полностью восстанавливает {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способности{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}надзирателя{/g} требуют на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} меньше.
До конца боя направленные в киберорла атаки противника, чей {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}обзор заблокирован{/g}, наносят {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критический урон{/g}, если {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g} в союзников этого противника.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full wounds (even if it has 0 wounds). The Overseer's next three abilities cost −1 AP less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that hit that enemy's allies automatically score critical hits.

traits.locale_text:
Киберорел немедленно полностью восстанавливает здоровье (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие способности надзирателя требуют на 1 ОД меньше.
До конца боя направленные в киберорла атаки противника, чей {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}обзор заблокирован{/g}, наносят критический урон, если попадают в союзников этого противника.

Киберорел немедленно полностью восстанавливает здоровье (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие способности надзирателя требуют на 1 ОД меньше.
До конца боя направленные в киберорла атаки противника, чей {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}обзор заблокирован{/g}, наносят критический урон, если попадают в союзников этого противника.

languages.text:
Der Cyber-Adler regeneriert seine {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} vollständig (selbst wenn er 0 Wunden hat). Die nächsten drei {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeiten{/g} des {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufsehers{/g} kosten -1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} weniger.
Bis zum Ende des Kampfes erzielen Angriffe des {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}gehemmten{/g} Gegners in die Richtung des Cyber-Adlers, die Verbündete dieses Gegners {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}treffen{/g}, automatisch {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritische Treffer{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} that enemy's allies automatically score {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Der Cyber-Adler regeneriert seine Wunden vollständig (selbst wenn er 0 Wunden hat). Die nächsten drei Fähigkeiten des Aufsehers kosten -1 AP weniger.
Bis zum Ende des Kampfes erzielen Angriffe des {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}gehemmten{/g} Gegners in die Richtung des Cyber-Adlers, die Verbündete dieses Gegners treffen, automatisch kritische Treffer.

languages.text:
Le cyber-aigle régénère immédiatement toute sa réserve de {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} (même s'il n'en a aucune). Le coût des trois prochaines {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} du {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g} est réduit de −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
Jusqu'à la fin du combat, quand les attaques de l'ennemi {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstrué{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touchent{/g} ses alliés situés derrière le cyber-aigle, elles infligent automatiquement des {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coups critiques{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} that enemy's allies automatically score {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Le cyber-aigle régénère immédiatement toute sa réserve de blessures (même s'il n'en a aucune). Le coût des trois prochaines capacités du surveillant est réduit de −1 PA.
Jusqu'à la fin du combat, quand les attaques de l'ennemi {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstrué{/g} touchent ses alliés situés derrière le cyber-aigle, elles infligent automatiquement des coups critiques.

languages.text:
完全恢复生化猎鹰的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}（即便生命值为0也可以完全恢复）。{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}接下来的3个{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}，消耗的{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}降低1点。
每当{g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}视野遮蔽{/g}的敌人朝生化猎鹰的方向攻击，失手{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}盟友时，此次攻击都必定造成{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}，效果持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} that enemy's allies automatically score {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
完全恢复生化猎鹰的生命值（即便生命值为0也可以完全恢复）。监察官接下来的3个能力，消耗的行动点数降低1点。
每当{g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}视野遮蔽{/g}的敌人朝生化猎鹰的方向攻击，失手命中盟友时，此次攻击都必定造成暴击，效果持续至战斗结束。

languages.text:
La ciberáguila recupera inmediatamente todas las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} (aunque esté a 0 heridas). Las siguientes 3 {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g} cuestan −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
Hasta el final del combate, los ataques de un enemigo {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstruido{/g} en dirección a la ciberáguila que {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impactan{/g} en los aliados del enemigo infligen automáticamente un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impacto crítico{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} that enemy's allies automatically score {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
La ciberáguila recupera inmediatamente todas las heridas (aunque esté a 0 heridas). Las siguientes 3 capacidades del supervisor cuestan −1 PA.
Hasta el final del combate, los ataques de un enemigo {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstruido{/g} en dirección a la ciberáguila que impactan en los aliados del enemigo infligen automáticamente un impacto crítico.

languages.text:
サイバーイーグルは即座に全快まで回復する（{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が0の場合も）。{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}監督官{/g}の次の3つの{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}コストが-1{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}される。
戦闘終了まで、{g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}妨害された{/g}敵がサイバーイーグルに向かって行う{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}攻撃{/g}で、その敵の味方に命中したものは自動的に{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルヒット{/g}となる。
languages.original_text:
The cyber-eagle immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy's attacks in the direction of the cyber-eagle that {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} that enemy's allies automatically score {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
サイバーイーグルは即座に全快まで回復する（傷が0の場合も）。監督官の次の3つのアビリティコストが-1APされる。
戦闘終了まで、{g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}妨害された{/g}敵がサイバーイーグルに向かって行う攻撃で、その敵の味方に命中したものは自動的にクリティカルヒットとなる。

languages.text:
Siber kartal, anında iyileşerek tam {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlığına{/g} kavuşur (sağlık puanı 0 olsa bile). {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen'in{/g} sonraki üç {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyeti{/g} 1 puan daha az {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} harcar.
{g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}Engellenen{/g} düşmanın siber kartalın bulunduğu yöne doğru yaptığı saldırılar, o düşmanın dost birimlerini {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurursa{/g} bu vuruşlar otomatik olarak {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruşa{/g} dönüşür. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
